title: Update libfontconfig-dev for loong64 from 2.17.1-4 to 2.17.1-5
body:
**Description of Change**

The `libfontconfig-dev_2.17.1-4_loong64.deb` package has been superseded in the Debian repository. Update to `2.17.1-5` in the Debian 13 cross-compilation Dockerfile to unbreak loong64 Docker builds.

- Updated `FC_VERSION` for `loong64` in `scripts/Docker/debian/clang-cross/13/Dockerfile`

**Bugs Fixed**

None.

**API Changes**

None.

**Behavioral Changes**

None.

**Required skia PR**

None.

**PR Checklist**

- [ ] Has tests (Docker image build change only — no unit tests applicable)
- [x] Rebased on top of main at time of PR
- [ ] Merged related skia PRs
- [x] Changes adhere to coding standard
- [x] Updated documentation
